channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Shohei Ohtani Role Changing? 'Everything Should Be on Table,' Per Dave Roberts
item.description: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts said that "everything should be on the table" regarding potentially tweaking Shohei Ohtani's role.

item.title: BetMGM Bonus Code FOXSPORTS: $1500 in Bonus Bets if Your First Bet Loses
item.description: Use BetMGM Bonus Code FOXSPORTS to get up to $1,500 back in Bonus Bets if your first wager loses. Claim your BetMGM welcome offer today.

item.title: Diego Maradona's Heartbreak in Italy '90 Joins Top World Cup Moments List
item.description: The World Cup is defined by memorable moments. Counting down to the top 100 of all-time.

item.title: Patriots Coach Mike Vrabel Seeking Counseling, Will Miss Day 3 of 2026 NFL Draft
item.description: New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel is seeking counseling and will not be with the team for Day 3 of the 2026 NFL Draft.

item.title: 2025-26 NBA Playoff Odds: Spreads, Lines for First-Round Series
item.description: The NBA playoffs are here. Check out the odds for each first-round series.

item.title: Our NFL draft-day mock: Yates' final predictions for all 32 picks, plus Kiper's notes
item.description: Field Yates projects the first 32 draft picks one last time -- including a trade -- and Mel Kiper Jr. shares what he's hearing heading into Round 1 (8...

item.title: West playoff takeaways: Thunder cruise past Suns for 2-0 lead
item.description: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Western Conference's first round.

item.title: Why Rosenior failed at Chelsea, and what club must change for next manager
item.description: Liam Rosenior couldn't win over Chelsea's players or fans as manager. Now the club's owners must reevaluate the structure that led to his appointment.

item.title: Fine margins separate Man City and Arsenal in a heated Premier League title race
item.description: Manchester City's race with Arsenal might go until the very end.

item.title: MLB Power Rankings: Who are the top teams one month into the season?
item.description: A new No. 2 and an NL-heavy top 10 dominate our rankings four weeks into the 2026 season.
